description: A portrait-orientation designed quote card built on a photograph of President Trump seated at a conference/Situation-Room-style table in front of a wood-paneled wall bearing the large gold-and-black Seal of the President of the United States ('SEAL OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES' encircling the eagle). Trump wears a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap, a navy suit, white shirt, and red tie, looking upward/forward with a serious expression; the foreground table is dark and slightly blurred with indistinct objects. The lower portion of the image darkens into a vignette carrying white text with a large white opening quotation mark. The text reads verbatim: '"If you hurt Americans, or are planning to hurt Americans, We Will Find You & We Will Kill You' followed by the attribution 'President Donald J. Trump'. The design is the standard White House photo-plus-pull-quote template. Propaganda technique: an explicit, menacing deterrence/strength message delivered with the gravitas of the presidential seal and MAGA branding, projecting lethal resolve against anyone threatening Americans. Target audience: domestic supporters (signaling toughness/protection) and adversaries abroad (signaling threat).
notable_text: If you hurt Americans, or are planning to hurt Americans, We Will Find You & We Will Kill You - President Donald J. Trump
